scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix shell && npm i --prefix product && npm i --prefix cart
scripts.build:remotes: npm run build --prefix product && npm run build --prefix cart
scripts.start: npm run build:remotes && concurrently "npm run start:product" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:shell"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:product" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:shell"
